title: Unreal Editor Interface
description: Navigate the Unreal Engine 5 Editor interface, viewports, content browser, details panel, and world outliner.
learningObjectives: Navigate viewports using standard control schemes
Manage asset importing and content folder structures
Manipulate transforms (translation, rotation, scale) of actors placed in levels

sections.title: Unreal Engine 5 Editor Panels
sections.content:
The Unreal Editor provides tools to assemble levels and build logic:

1. **Viewport**: 3D spatial window of the level.
2. **Content Browser**: Local asset library manager (materials, meshes, blueprints).
3. **Details Panel**: Shows properties and components of the selected actor.
4. **World Outliner**: Hierarchical directory of all actors currently spawned in the loaded level.

sections.title: Configuring Actor Details
sections.content: When you select a static mesh actor in the Viewport, you configure its transform, collision profiles, and active material slots inside the Details panel, which writes coordinates directly to the actor's properties array.
